title: Saved Object Control Center
concept: A responsive tabbed operations console that treats temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory Playgrounds as first-class objects with ownership, current selection, storage-specific actions, and visible consequences while protecting the live WordPress shell.
flows: Finish settings Save & Reload end to end for a stored Playground by changing WordPress, PHP, language, network, and multisite settings, showing reload progress, preserving saved identity, updating the runtime badge, saved row, preview state, and transfer history.

Show unsaved settings reset behavior by switching to the temporary object, warning that reset discards files and database changes, confirming reset, showing progress, and updating the temporary runtime state.
Finish destructive delete end to end with delete warning, cancel support, confirmation, progress, saved row removal, transfer history entry, and active-site fallback to the Unsaved Playground.

Save the current Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, file-copy progress, folder permission copy, active identity mutation, storage badge update, saved row update, and transfer history.

Start or import from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with route-specific inputs and replacement warnings.
Use Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs while Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, refresh, Save, and active storage state remain visible.
Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint copy/download/run with visible result states.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved, local-directory, and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, delete, and reset object actions
Delete confirmation with cancel, progress, row removal, and active fallback
URL path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory shell states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Unsaved destructive reset warning and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with validation, copy, download, run, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning state
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history for saves, reloads, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, deletes, and Blueprint runs
